data.content: Shipment review APPROVED. Merge commit 6ccd1125c6dc verified on origin/main. All 3 CI workflows (Changesets, Coverage Badge, CI) passed. No invariants to check. Alias threading confirmed end-to-end: KnotRecord→toBeat()→Beat/WaveBeat/BeatDependency/CascadeDescendant→8 view components. All implementation commits tagged on knot. No regressions detected.
